sections.description: V. Review of Major Elements of the SWPPP

sheets.description: V. Review of Major Elements of the SWPPP

entries.label: Instructions: Review and Update the SWPPP
Are there any changes to the pollution prevention team? (Table 1)
Are there any changes to the materials inventory? (Table 4)
Are there any changes in the industrial activities?
Are there any new potential pollutant sources? (Sec 6.1, Table 6)
Are the BMPs for each potential pollutant source identified and described?
Has employee(s) training been conducted and documented in Appendix F? (annual training)
If no, indicate reason:
Summarize any necessary SWPPP revisions needed to update the SWPPP
Have all updates been made to the SWPPP?
If no, indicate schedule for implementing SWPPP revisions.
Were there any incidents of non-compliance (i.e. un-authorized non-storm water discharges)?
If yes, describe the corrective action.

entries.label: 1. I certify under penalty of law that this document and all attachments were prepared under my direction or supervision in accordance with a system designed to ensure that qualified personnel properly gather and evaluate the information submitted. Based on my inquiry of the person or persons who manage the system, or those persons directly responsible for gathering the information, the information submitted is to the best of my knowledge and believe, true, accurate, and complete. I am aware that there are significate penalties for submitting false information, including the possibility of fine and imprisonment for knowing violations.
